mapper.sql: s.id, s.shipping_no, s.order_id, s.order_no, s.customer_id, s.customer_name, s.carrier, s.tracking_no, s.shipping_date, s.estimated_arrival_date, s.actual_arrival_date, s.carton_count, s.total_volume, s.total_gross_weight, s.total_net_weight, s.customs_status, s.customs_declaration_no, s.status, s.port_of_loading, s.port_of_destination, s.trade_term, s.remark, s.owner_id, s.department_id, s.created_by, s.created_time, s.updated_by, s.updated_time
